case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JOSE NORBERTO CORNEJO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO, JOSE NORBERTO
